name: Kevin Morales
title: Senior Software Engineer
bio:
You can call me Kevinho. I studied Electronic, Automation, and Control Engineering at the University of the Armed Forces – ESPE.

I'm a Senior Software Engineer at SoFi Tech Solutions, where I architect and evolve enterprise mobile banking platforms for financial institutions across Latin America. I specialize in Swift, SwiftUI, Kotlin, and scalable mobile architectures for fintech.

Beyond product engineering, I'm an EDteam instructor, Cursor Ambassador, GDG Tsáchilas organizer, international speaker, and host of the DevLokos podcast. I'm a big believer in lifelong learning — one of my favorite mottos is: "DON'T STOP LEARNING!"
shortBio: Senior Software Engineer at SoFi Tech Solutions · Host of DevLokos · GDG Tsáchilas Organizer · iOS Certified by Meta · Speaker · Cursor Ambassador
education: Electronic, Automation, and Control Engineering - University of the Armed Forces (ESPE)
motto: Be DIFFERENT and leave a legacy to the world that everything is possible when you have it in your mind.
aboutMe:
Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years building high-performance mobile banking and fintech platforms. At SoFi Tech Solutions, I lead architecture and engineering for enterprise mobile banking—payments, investments, credit, and authorization workflows serving millions of users.

Technical leader, EDteam instructor, and Cursor Ambassador. Active in Google Developer Groups (GDG), mentoring developers and creating educational content. International speaker on Sessionize.

Podcast host and founder of DevLokos.
